data.title: Goldman Sachs’ Chief US Economist Says Tariffs Unlikely To Spark a Prolonged Inflation Period, Predicts Three Rate Cuts This Year
data.description:
David Mericle, chief US economist at Goldman Sachs, says that President Trump’s tariffs are unlikely to result in a lengthy period of inflation. In a new interview with CNBC Television, Mericle says he expects the Fed to make three rate cuts this year, starting in two months, as he predicts tariff-driven inflation will be transitory.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/07/19/goldman-sachs-chief-us-economist-says-tariffs-unlikely-to-spark-a-prolonged-inflation-period-predicts-three-rate-cuts-this-year/

data.title: FTX creditor representative: Bahamas may be subject to UK/EU rules and requires additional approval
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that FTX creditor representative Sunil wrote that the Bahamas appears to be subject to UK/EU rules and the claims process requires additional regulatory approval.

data.title: Hong Kong Monetary Authority to Implement Invitation-Based Stablecoin Licensing
data.description:
According to Foresight News, sources indicate that the issuance of stablecoin licenses will not follow the traditional method of applicants downloading forms and submitting written applications. Instead, an invitation-based application process will be adopted. 

In practice, the Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA), responsible for regulating the licensing, will engage in preliminary discussions with potential stablecoin license applicants. This pre-communication aims to assess whether the applicants meet the basic qualifications. Only those who receive preliminary approval during these discussions will be issued application forms by the HKMA.

data.title: Hedge funds short Japan’s yen ahead of key Upper House vote
data.description:
Hedge funds are betting against the yen hard this week, dumping more than $1. 1 billion into short positions just days before Japan’s Upper House election on Sunday, according to Bloomberg. Around 12,606 futures and options contracts have been opened against the currency, marking the first net bearish positioning since March. The focus is on whether […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/hedge-funds-short-japan-yen/

data.title: OOKC strategically invests $5 million in Giants Protocol to support its global RWA expansion
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News OOKC Labs announced a strategic investment of US$5 million in Giants Protocol to support its global RWA expansion in the Middle East, North Africa, Europe and North America, focusing on compliance, growth, institutional partnerships and infrastructure construction.
It is reported that OOKC is headquartered in Dubai and is a comprehensive investment institution integrating investment and consulting in the Middle East and North Africa, with localized advantageous resources. OOKC Group will help Giants Protocol complete local resource docking and realize the expansion and deepening of the Middle East and European markets in all aspects.

data.title: Data: USDC circulation increased by about 1.8 billion in the past 7 days
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official data, in the 7 days ending July 17, Circle issued about 7.5 billion USDC, redeemed about 5.7 billion USDC, and the circulation increased by about 1.8 billion. The total circulation of USDC is 64.5 billion, and the reserve is about 64.7 billion US dollars, of which about 10.1 billion is in cash, and the Circle Reserve Fund holds about 54.7 billion US dollars.

data.title: Circle's USDC Circulation Sees Significant Increase
data.description: According to PANews, official data reveals that Circle issued approximately 7.5 billion USDC and redeemed around 5.7 billion USDC in the seven days leading up to July 17. This activity resulted in a net increase of about 1.8 billion USDC in circulation. The total circulation of USDC now stands at 64.5 billion, with reserves amounting to approximately $64.7 billion. Of these reserves, around $10.1 billion is held in cash, while the Circle Reserve Fund holds approximately $54.7 billion.
